```yaml
name: Test for workflow_dispatch input types
on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      name:
        type: choice
        description: Name of event
        options:
          - workflow_dispatch
          - workflow_call
          - webhook
      type:
        type: choice
        description: Type of input
        options:
          - choice
          - string
          - boolean
          - environment
        default: string
      submitter:
        type: string
      message:
        type: string
        default: hello
      verbose:
        type: boolean
        default: false
      dry-run:
        type: boolean
        default: true
      notification:
        type: boolean
      environment:
        type: environment
      number:
        type: number
        default: 123
      pi:
        type: number
        default: 3.1415

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: echo '${{ github.event.inputs.name }}'
      - run: echo '${{ github.event.inputs.type }}'
      - run: echo '${{ github.event.inputs.submitter }}'
      - run: echo '${{ github.event.inputs.message }}'
      - run: echo '${{ github.event.inputs.verbose }}'
      - run: echo '${{ github.event.inputs.dry-run }}'
      - run: echo '${{ github.event.inputs.notification }}'
      - run: echo '${{ github.event.inputs.environment }}'
      - run: echo '${{ github.event.inputs.number }}'
      - run: echo "${{ contains('hello, world!', github.event.inputs.name) }}"
        if: ${{ github.event.inputs.verbose }}
```

## File: `testdata/projects/README.md`
```markdown
This directory contains project directories tested by `TestLinterLintProject` in `linter_test.go`.

Each directory represents one project. And `<project>.out` file describes all errors when linting the project (one error per
line). Error messages in the file must be sorted by file paths and error positions. An empty file means no error.

Each project must contain `workflows` directory and it must contain at least one workflow file.

Working directory is set to `projects/<project>` when running the tests. File paths in `.out` files should be relative to the
project directory.

```
├── some_project
│   ├── actionlint.yaml
│   ├── action1
│   │   └── action.yaml
│   ├── action2
│   │   └── action.yaml
│   └── workflows
│       ├── workflow1.yaml
│       └── workflow2.yaml
└── some_project.out
```
```

## File: `testdata/projects/broken_local_action/workflows/test.yaml`
```yaml
on: push

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: ./action/broken_input
        with:
          hello: world
      - uses: ./action/broken_output
      - uses: ./action/duplicate_input
        with:
          foo: ...
      - uses: ./action/duplicate_output
      - uses: ./action/multiple_unmarshal_errors
      # Check: Do not repeat error
      - uses: ./action/broken_output
```

## File: `testdata/projects/broken_reusable_workflow/README.md`
```markdown
Reusable workflows are separate in [`reusable`](./reusable) otherwise errors are not deterministic. When some broken workflow is parsed first, it causes parse error `ReusableWorkflowMetadata` is created from `WorkflowCallEvent` AST node. But when `test.yaml` is parsed first, `ReusableWorkflowMetadata` instance is parsed in `reusable_workflow.go` and causes its own parse error.
```

## File: `testdata/projects/broken_reusable_workflow/reusable/broken.yaml`
```yaml
on:
  workflow_call:
    outputs: my cool outputs

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: echo ...
```

## File: `testdata/projects/config_variables/workflows/test.yaml`
```yaml
on: push

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      # These are listed
      - run: echo '${{ vars.FOO }}'
      - run: echo '${{ vars.WOO }}'
      # Name is case-insensitive
      - run: echo '${{ vars.foo }}'
      - run: echo '${{ vars.Foo }}'
      # ERROR: Undefined var
      - run: echo '${{ vars.PIYO }}'
```

## File: `testdata/projects/deprecated_inputs/action/action.yaml`
```yaml
name: 'My action'
author: 'rhysd <https://rhysd.github.io>'
description: 'my action'

inputs:
  input1:
    deprecationMessage: minimal message
  input2:
    deprecationMessage: message ending with period.
  input3:
    deprecationMessage: '  message with spaces  '
  input4:
    deprecationMessage: |
      this is first line.
      this is second line.
      this is third line.
  input5:
    deprecationMessage: |
      this is first line.                   
        this is second line.									
          this is third line.
  input6:
    deprecationMessage:
  # Usage of this input is not reported as error because it is marked as 'required'
  input7:
    required: true
    deprecationMessage: some message
  # Usage of this input is reported as error because it is actually not required due to the default value
  input8:
    required: true
    default: some value
    deprecationMessage: some message

runs:
  using: 'node20'
  main: 'index.js'
```

```yaml
        with:
          input1: test

          input3: test
          input4: test
          input5: test
          input6: test
          input7: test
          input8: test
```

## File: `testdata/projects/docker_specific_inputs/workflows/test.yaml`
```yaml
on: push

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      # OK
      - uses: ./action_all
        with:
          entrypoint: foo
          args: foo
      # Unknown input 'entrypoint'
      - uses: ./action_args
        with:
          entrypoint: foo
          args: foo
      # Unknown input 'args'
      - uses: ./action_entrypoint
        with:
          entrypoint: foo
          args: foo
      # Unknown inputs 'entrypoint' and 'args'
      - uses: ./action_none
        with:
          entrypoint: foo
          args: foo
      # Missing inputs 'entrypoint' and 'args'
      - uses: ./action_all
      # Missing input 'args'
      - uses: ./action_args
      # Missing input 'entrypoint'
      - uses: ./action_entrypoint
      # OK
      - uses: ./action_none
```

## File: `testdata/projects/example_inputs_secrets_in_workflow_call/workflows/test.yaml`
```yaml
on: push

jobs:
  # Check required/undefined inputs and secrets
  missing-required:
    uses: ./.github/workflows/reusable.yaml
    with:
      # ERROR: Undefined input
      user: rhysd
      # ERROR: Required input "name" is missing
    secrets:
      # ERROR: Undefined secret
      credentials: my-token
      # ERROR: Required secret "password" is missing

  # Check types of inputs defined in reusable workflow
  type-checks:
    uses: ./.github/workflows/reusable.yaml
    with:
      name: rhysd
      # ERROR: Cannot assign bool value to number input
      id: true
      # ERROR: Cannot assign null to string input. If you want to pass string "null", use ${{ 'null' }}
      message: null
    secrets:
      password: p@ssw0rd
```

## File: `testdata/projects/example_workflow_call_outputs_downstream_jobs/workflows/test.yaml`
```yaml
on: push

jobs:
  get_build_info:
    uses: ./.github/workflows/get-build-info.yaml
  downstream:
    needs: [get_build_info]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      # OK. `version` is defined in the reusable workflow
      - run: echo '${{ needs.get_build_info.outputs.version }}'
      # ERROR: `tag` is not defined in the reusable workflow
      - run: echo '${{ needs.get_build_info.outputs.tag }}'
```

```yaml
on: push

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: ./old_node
      - uses: ./missing_runs
      - uses: ./missing_using
      - uses: ./unknown_runner
      - uses: ./invalid_node_version
      - uses: ./node12
      # Check using same invalid action twice does not duplicate the errors
      - uses: ./old_node
```

## File: `testdata/projects/local_composite_action/all_invalid_keys/action.yaml`
```yaml
name: 'Composite action'
author: 'rhysd <https://rhysd.github.io>'
description: 'Correct composite action'

runs:
  using: 'composite'
  steps:
    - run: echo hello
  main: index.js
  pre: pre.js
  pre-if: true
  post: post.js
  post-if: true
  image: 'docker://debian:stretch-slim'
  pre-entrypoint: pre.sh
  entrypoint: main.sh
  post-entrypoint: post.sh
  args: [foo, bar]
  env:
    FOO: BAR
```

```yaml
paths:
  workflows/**/*.yaml:
    ignore:
      - unknown Webhook event ".+"
  workflows/*.yaml:
    ignore:
      - context ".+" is not allowed here
  workflows/bar.yaml:
    ignore:
      - label ".+" is unknown\. available labels are
```

## File: `testdata/projects/recursive_workflow_call/workflows/recursive.yaml`
```yaml
on:
  workflow_call:
    inputs:
      input1:
        type: string
      input2:
        type: number
        required: true
    outputs:
      output1:
        value: '...'
    secrets:
      secret1:
      secret2:
        required: true

jobs:
  caller:
    uses: ./workflows/recursive.yaml
    with:
      input1: hello
      input2: 42
    secrets:
      secret1: aaa
      secret2: bbb
  other:
    needs: [caller]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: echo '${{ needs.caller.outputs.output1 }}'
```

## File: `testdata/projects/workflow_call_input_type_check/workflows/test.yaml`
```yaml
on: push

jobs:
  caller1:
    uses: ./workflows/reusable.yaml
    with:
      # Note: any value can be converted into bool
      str_input: null
      num_input: false
      bool_input: 'foo!'
      broken_input: null
  caller2:
    uses: ./workflows/reusable.yaml
    with:
      str_input: ${{ true }}
      num_input: ${{ 'foo' }}
      broken_input: 42
  caller3:
    uses: ./workflows/reusable.yaml
    with:
      str_input:
      num_input:
      broken_input: 'hello'
```

## File: `testdata/projects/workflow_call_missing_required/workflows/reusable.yaml`
```yaml
on:
  workflow_call:
    inputs:
      optional1:
        type: string
      optional2:
        type: string
        default: foo!
      optional3:
        type: string
        required: false
      required1:
        type: number
        required: true
    secrets:
      optional1:
      optional2:
        required: false
      required1:
        required: true

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: 'bye'
```

```yaml
jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: echo hello
```

## File: `testdata/projects/workflow_call_ok/workflows/reusable_all_optional.yaml`
```yaml
on:
  workflow_call:
    inputs:
      str:
        type: string
        default: hi
      num:
        type: number
        default: 42
      bool:
        type: boolean
        default: true
    outputs:
      output1:
        value: ${{ jobs.run.outputs.message }}
    secrets:
      foo:

jobs:
  run:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      message: '${{ inputs.str }}, ${{ inputs.num }}, ${{ inputs.bool }}, ${{ secrets.foo }}'
    steps:
      - run: echo hello
```

## File: `testdata/projects/workflow_call_ok/workflows/reusable_all_required.yaml`
```yaml
on:
  workflow_call:
    inputs:
      str:
        type: string
        required: true
      num:
        type: number
        required: true
      bool:
        type: boolean
        required: true
    outputs:
      output1:
        value: ${{ jobs.run.outputs.message }}
    secrets:
      foo:
        required: true

jobs:
  run:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      message: '${{ inputs.str }}, ${{ inputs.num }}, ${{ inputs.bool }}, ${{ secrets.foo }}'
    steps:
      - run: echo hello
```

## File: `testdata/projects/workflow_call_ok/workflows/test.yaml`
```yaml
on: push

jobs:
  caller1:
    uses: ./workflows/reusable_all_required.yaml
    with:
      str: hi
      num: 13
      bool: true
    secrets:
      foo: bar
  caller2:
    uses: ./workflows/reusable_all_optional.yaml
    with:
      str: hi
      num: 13
      bool: true
    secrets:
      foo: bar
  caller3:
    uses: ./workflows/reusable_all_optional.yaml
  caller4:
    uses: ./workflows/empty1.yaml
  caller5:
    uses: ./workflows/empty2.yaml
  caller6:
    uses: ./workflows/empty3.yaml
  pass-through-placeholder:
    uses: ./workflows/reusable_all_required.yaml
    with:
      str: ${{ 'hi' }}
      num: ${{ 13 }}
      bool: ${{ true }}
    secrets:
      foo: ${{ 'bar' }}
```

```yaml
        type: string

    secrets:

jobs:
```

## File: `testdata/projects/workflow_call_undefined/workflows/test.yaml`
```yaml
on: push

jobs:
  caller:
    uses: ./workflows/reusable.yaml
    with:
      aaa: this is not existing
      foo: this is existing
    secrets:
      bbb: this is not existing
      piyo: this is existing
  other:
    needs: [caller]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: echo '${{ needs.caller.outputs.bar }} is existing'
      - run: echo '${{ needs.caller.outputs.ccc }} is not existing'
  empty:
    uses: ./workflows/empty_reusable.yaml
    with:
      input1: this is not existing
    secrets:
      secret1: this is not existing
```

## File: `testdata/projects/workflow_call_upper_case/workflows/output.yaml`
```yaml
on: push

jobs:
  upper:
    uses: ./reusable/upper.yaml
    with:
      my_input_1: hello
      my_input_2: world
    secrets:
      my_secret_1: hello
      my_secret_2: world
  lower:
    uses: ./reusable/lower.yaml
    with:
      my_input_1: hello
      my_input_2: world
    secrets:
      my_secret_1: hello
      my_secret_2: world
  downstream:
    needs: [upper, lower]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - run: echo 'OK    ${{ needs.upper.outputs.my_output_1 }}'
      - run: echo 'OK    ${{ needs.upper.outputs.MY_OUTPUT_1 }}'
      - run: echo 'OK    ${{ needs.lower.outputs.my_output_1 }}'
      - run: echo 'OK    ${{ needs.lower.outputs.MY_OUTPUT_1 }}'
      - run: echo 'OK    ${{ needs.upper.outputs.my_output_2 }}'
      - run: echo 'OK    ${{ needs.upper.outputs.MY_OUTPUT_2 }}'
      - run: echo 'OK    ${{ needs.lower.outputs.my_output_2 }}'
      - run: echo 'OK    ${{ needs.lower.outputs.MY_OUTPUT_2 }}'
      - run: echo 'ERROR ${{ needs.upper.outputs.my_output_3 }}'
      - run: echo 'ERROR ${{ needs.upper.outputs.MY_OUTPUT_3 }}'
      - run: echo 'ERROR ${{ needs.lower.outputs.my_output_3 }}'
      - run: echo 'ERROR ${{ needs.lower.outputs.MY_OUTPUT_3 }}'
```

## File: `testdata/projects/yaml_anchor_in_action/action/action.yaml`
```yaml
name: 'Docker action'
author: 'rhysd <https://rhysd.github.io>'
description: &description 'This is test'

inputs:
  foo: &input
    description: *description
  bar: *input

outputs:
  foo:
    description: *description

runs:
  using: 'docker'
  image: 'ghcr.io/rhysd/actionlint:latest'
  args:
    - ${{ inputs.foo }}
    - ${{ inputs.bar }}
    - *description
```

## File: `testdata/projects/yaml_anchor_in_action/workflows/test.yaml`
```yaml
on: push

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: ./action
        id: test
      - run: echo ${{ steps.test.outputs.foo }}
```

## File: `testdata/reusable_workflow_metadata/ok.yaml`
```yaml
name: minimal

on:
  workflow_call:
    inputs:
      input1:
        description: input
        type: string
      input2:
        type: boolean
        required: true
    outputs:
      output1:
        description: output
        value: foo
    secrets:
      secret1:
        description: secret
      secret2:
        required: true

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-18.04
    steps:
      - run: echo ...
```
